items.title: A 680km Journey To Save Young Lives
items.summary: Sepeda Amal Borneo 2026 calls on public support to help fund life-saving surgeries and care for children facing life-threatening and often overlooked medical conditions. The post A 680km Journey To Save Young Lives appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Motherhood, Recovery, And The Invisible Labour We Refuse To See — June Joseph
items.summary: For many women, postpartum is marked instead by prolonged physical depletion, emotional strain, and sustained caregiving labour that continues well beyond discharge from hospital. The post Motherhood, Recovery, And The Invisible Labour We Refuse To See — June Joseph appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Newcastle University Claims Malaysian Medical Graduates Can Still Work In UK
items.summary: Newcastle University claims it's still possible for NUMed graduates to work in the UK because NUMed's MBBS degree remains recognised. "It is important, however, to distinguish between changes in workforce policy and the academic value of a medical degree." The post Newcastle University Claims Malaysian Medical Graduates Can Still Work In UK appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Why A 2+1 Schedule For PCV20 Is The Smart Choice — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Dr Zulkifli Ismail & Dr David Ng
items.summary: Public health policy should be guided not only by licensing pathways, but also by evolving immunological and real-world effectiveness data. The post Why A 2+1 Schedule For PCV20 Is The Smart Choice — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Dr Zulkifli Ismail & Dr David Ng appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Reflections For World Schizophrenia Day — Dr Loshi Rajen
items.summary: With appropriate treatment and support, people with schizophrenia can and do live meaningful lives, but many never receive the conditions needed for that to unfold. The post Reflections For World Schizophrenia Day — Dr Loshi Rajen appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Lawyer: Selling Nicotine Vapes Potentially An Offence After Court Ruling
items.summary: A lawyer in the nicotine case says vape sellers, distributors, and manufacturers may be committing an offence by selling nicotine vapes because the High Court ruling means that liquid nicotine continues to be classified as a poison under the Poisons Act. The post Lawyer: Selling Nicotine Vapes Potentially An Offence After Court Ruling appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Selgate Launches First Specialist Hospital With Over 30 Specialists
items.summary: Selgate has launched its first specialist hospital, SSH Rawang, that fills a gap in private health care access in northern Selangor. The post Selgate Launches First Specialist Hospital With Over 30 Specialists appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Clarity Is A Clinical Tool, Not A Cultural Preference — Dr Lim Ren Jye
items.summary: I use Bahasa Malaysia daily with my colleagues and patients. But clinical reality demands pragmatism, not dogma. When dealing with an anxious or illiterate grandmother, forcing a rigid linguistic template isn't patriotism; it's a clinical hazard. The post Clarity Is A Clinical Tool, Not A Cultural Preference — Dr Lim Ren Jye appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Why Young Malaysians Are Becoming More Vulnerable To Diabetes — Nicson Yap Yong Ze
items.summary: Diabetes among young Malaysians is linked to diet, lifestyle, education, and daily habits, and if these issues continue to be ignored, they may face chronic health conditions earlier in life. The post Why Young Malaysians Are Becoming More Vulnerable To Diabetes — Nicson Yap Yong Ze appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Why Microwaves Aren’t The Villains We Think They Are — Tan Lih Sy & Mohammad Irwan Hakeem
items.summary: Scientific evidence continues to show that when used correctly, microwaves are safe and can even help preserve nutrients better than some conventional cooking methods. The post Why Microwaves Aren’t The Villains We Think They Are — Tan Lih Sy & Mohammad Irwan Hakeem appeared first on CodeBlue .
